'''Kelna Toodo''' was a [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Gambler/Legends|gambler]]. Early in his career, Toodo had been a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot's]] apprentice when he discovered the lure of gambling. Soon, he finished his apprenticeship, bought the ''[[Hot Streak]]'', a [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]], with the money that he had earned gambling, and became a professional gambler. However, he was caught cheating on [[Beeda]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] floating casino. To keep himself from being punished, he accepted a job as one of Beeda's snitches.

==Behind the scenes==
Despite his image in ''[[Ultimate Adversaries]]'', Kelna Toodo was described in the book as having dark [[Color/Legends|green]] skin and glossy yellow [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="UA" />
